events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czech Republic vs Mexico
events.note: The Czech national football team faces Mexico in a crucial group stage match at the FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico. This match is pivotal for the Czech team's advancement in the tournament.
events.marketing_angle: Highlighting national pride and support for the Czech team during the World Cup.
events.why_selected: As the Czech Republic is participating in the World Cup, this match is of utmost importance to the audience.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 32 Matches
events.note: The Round of 32 in the FIFA World Cup 2026 begins, featuring knockout matches as teams vie for a spot in the quarterfinals. The Czech Republic's performance in this stage will be closely followed by fans.
events.marketing_angle: Building excitement for the knockout stages of the World Cup, with a focus on the Czech team's journey.
events.why_selected: The progression of the Czech team in the World Cup is a major event for the audience.

events.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
events.note: Important international awareness day for thoughtful Melody4U content. Use hopeful, supportive language and avoid fearmongering, shock visuals, or graphic imagery.
events.marketing_angle: thoughtful awareness message with hope and support
events.why_selected: A main international significant day in the target week; serious topics should be handled with awareness tone, not skipped.

events.title: Formula 1: Austrian Grand Prix
events.note: The Formula 1 season continues with the Austrian Grand Prix at the Red Bull Ring in Spielberg. This race is known for its challenging turns and high-speed straights, offering thrilling action for motorsport fans.
events.marketing_angle: Engaging motorsport enthusiasts with the excitement of the Austrian Grand Prix.
events.why_selected: Formula 1 races are popular among Czech motorsport fans, and the Austrian Grand Prix is a notable event in the calendar.

events.title: Memorial Day for Victims of the Communist Regime / Political Prisoners
events.note: Czech memorial day requiring calm, dignified and respectful visual language. No hype, no sensationalism, and no disturbing imagery.
events.marketing_angle: respectful remembrance for a Czech audience
events.why_selected: A major Czech memorial day in the target week; it should be included with respectful memorial tone rather than ignored.

events.title: St. John’s Day (Midsummer)
events.note: Celebration of St. John’s Day, a traditional Czech holiday marking the beginning of summer with various cultural events and festivities.
events.marketing_angle: Promoting cultural heritage and community engagement through St. John’s Day celebrations.
events.why_selected: St. John’s Day is a significant cultural event in the Czech Republic, offering opportunities for community engagement and cultural promotion.

events.title: F1 Velká cena Rakouska – Spielberg
events.note: Top motorsport priority close to Czech fans. Use generic racing atmosphere and avoid official F1 branding, team liveries, and real driver likenesses.
events.marketing_angle: gift for a racing fan before the weekend
events.why_selected: Formula 1 is the top motorsport storyline after Czech/world tournament themes and main significant days.

events.title: Začátek léta – letní slunovrat
events.note: Seasonal summer-solstice mood for warm Czech social content.
events.why_selected: A soft seasonal theme can support Melody4U content if capacity remains after the main editorial priorities.
